changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item WHERE oc_oid IN ( 'I_OPHTH_OD_SPECTRALIS_DONE', 'I_OPHTH_OS_SPECTRALIS_DONE', 'I_OPHTH_OD_SPECTRALIS_DONE_REASON', 'I_OPHTH_OS_SPECTRALIS_DONE_REASON');

changeSet.comment: Align SPECTRALIS_DONE OIDs with catalog codes SPECTRALIS_OCT_DONE and SPECTRALIS_OCT_REASON.

changeSet.author: muw-ophthalmology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_form_metadata WHERE crf_version_id = 3 AND (left_item_text IN ('OD', 'OS') OR left_item_text IS NULL);

changeSet.comment: Backfill descriptive labels + unit hints for the 14 OPHTH v2.0 CRF items so the per-item label reads the catalog's measurement name instead of the bare laterality marker.

rollback.sql: UPDATE item_form_metadata ifm SET left_item_text = CASE WHEN i.oc_oid LIKE 'I_OPHTH_OD_%' THEN 'OD' WHEN i.oc_oid LIKE 'I_OPHTH_OS_%' THEN 'OS' ELSE ifm.left_item_text END, right_item_text = '' FROM item i WHERE ifm.item_id = i.item_id AND ifm.crf_version_id = 3;
